description:
Identify all world capital cities in the Southern Hemisphere (latitude < 0) using the 'world_survey.gpkg' project in QField (located in 'Imported Datasets'). Create a report file at '/sdcard/southern_hemisphere_capitals.txt' formatted with the total integer count on the first line and the names of the cities sorted alphabetically on the following lines (one per line).

Example format:
3
Buenos Aires
Canberra
Lima
